professionalSpecs: Expert in Game Architecture & Design Patterns

profile.name: Victor Ciorici
profile.summary: Senior Unity Developer with 12+ years of experience in game development using the Unity engine and C#. Experienced in the full development lifecycle, from concept and architecture to implementation, optimization, and release. Strong background in gameplay systems, UI development, multiplayer architecture, and performance optimization across PC, mobile, and VR platforms.

skills.name: Unity 3D / 2D
skills.desc: Expert knowledge of Core, HDRP, and URP pipelines.

skills.name: C# Architecture
skills.desc: Advanced software architecture and scalable design patterns.

skills.name: Multiplayer Systems
skills.desc: Networked gameplay using Photon Fusion and Client/Server architecture.

skills.name: VR / AR / XR
skills.desc: Immersive experiences for Oculus Quest/Rift, GearVR, and AR platforms.

skills.name: Shader Development
skills.desc: Custom HLSL shaders and rendering pipeline optimization.

skills.name: Custom Editors
skills.desc: Developing internal tools and level editors to support workflows.

skills.name: Procedural Systems
skills.desc: Real-time generation of meshes, textures, levels, and items.

skills.name: SDK Integration
skills.desc: Analytics, Facebook SDK, IAP, and platform services.

skills.name: PC / Steam
skills.desc: Full lifecycle development for desktop releases.

skills.name: Mobile Optimization
skills.desc: Profiling and refactoring for high-traffic mobile titles.

skills.name: WebGL / HTML5
skills.desc: Optimized deployments for browser-based interactive apps.

careerTimeline.description: Led UI architecture and gameplay feature development for Puzzle Panic, ensuring high-fidelity visual consistency and modular system design.
achievements: Implemented modular UI components for Puzzle Panic ensuring a responsive and polished player experience.
Developed core gameplay mechanics and internal tools for rapid feature iteration.
Collaborated with artists to maintain visual consistency across all UI assets.
Maintained high code quality through rigorous standards and peer code reviews.

careerTimeline.description: Architected and optimized gameplay systems for Zombie Slasher: Survival RPG, focusing on mobile performance and scalable RPG mechanics.
achievements: Developed core gameplay mechanics, UI systems, and feature sets for Zombie Slasher.
Optimized game performance through deep profiling and refactoring for a wide range of mobile devices.
Integrated critical third-party SDKs including analytics and platform-specific services.
Investigated and resolved complex concurrency and memory bugs.

careerTimeline.description: Consulting on high-performance Unity architectures and custom tool development.
Core gameplay engineering for DIY Projects - Art Puzzle Game, optimizing for millions of active users.
achievements: Significantly improved game performance through profiling and optimization of critical bottlenecks.
Collaborated with artists and animators to integrate high-quality visual assets into the DIY Projects pipeline.
Contributed to live game updates, feature development, and rapid bug resolution.
Reduced development overhead by improving system modularity and refactoring legacy code.

careerTimeline.description: Leading technical direction for a high-performance PC MOBA prototype using Photon Fusion.
achievements: Established company-wide coding standards to maintain long-term technical debt control.
Mentored junior developers and fostered a culture of technical excellence.
Diagnosed and resolved complex architectural issues while maintaining target performance.
Architected networked gameplay systems with deterministic state synchronization.

careerTimeline.description: Developing large-scale multiplayer prototypes and immersive AR/VR applications.

Implemented performance-critical XR systems for real-time applications.

Optimized performance for GearVR and Oculus Rift deployments hitting stable 90FPS.

manifesto.headline: Engineering Manifesto
manifesto.intro: A collection of core technical principles that guide every line of code I write. These are the architectural foundation of high-performance interactive systems.

tenets.title: Performance by Default
tenets.content: Optimization isn't a post-production step; it's a foundational requirement. High frame rates and low latency are the prerequisites for immersion.

tenets.title: Architecture as Art
tenets.content: Code should be as elegant as the visuals it renders. We build modular, scalable systems that survive the entropy of long-term development.

tenets.title: The DOTS Revolution
tenets.content: Embracing Data-Oriented Design to push hardware to its limits. Moving away from object-oriented bottlenecks to unlock massive scale.

tenets.title: Iterate or Die
tenets.content: Rapid prototyping combined with rigorous testing. We build, break, and refine until the system is bulletproof.

projects.title: Puzzle Panic
challenges: Developing scalable RPG attribute and inventory systems for high-traffic mobile play.
Profiling and refactoring core gameplay loops to ensure stability across low-end devices.
Integrating analytics and monetization SDKs without compromising performance.
